__fixture__.name: hosted_review_repair_packet_citation

The same anchor_id survives both surfaces so a reviewer auditing the repair packet can reconstruct the runbook step the user followed; the anchor's redaction_class is internal_support_restricted so a metadata_safe_default portability export MUST strip the anchor (export_posture=strip_for_redaction_class) and render a typed 'anchor redacted under internal_support_restricted' disclosure in its place. Reuse surfaces include the support summary, hosted-review evidence, and repair-packet evidence rows.
